title: Opening for Production Engineer at Exide Industries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Exide Industries
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
